nasb.text: He shall bring the bull to the doorway of the tent of meeting before the Lord, and he shall lay his hand on the head of the bull and slay the bull before the Lord.

esv.text: He shall bring the bull to the entrance of the tent of meeting before the Lord and lay his hand on the head of the bull and kill the bull before the Lord.

cnv.text: 他要把公牛牽到耶和華面前，在會幕門口，按手在公牛頭上，然後在耶和華面前宰殺那公牛，

ccb.text: 他要把公牛犊牵到会幕门口，将手放在牛头上，在耶和华面前宰牛。
